summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cashier Portal MVP (Phase 3A). All backend APIs functional (29/29 tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with complete POS workflow, shift management, and RBAC. Indonesian F&B menu items properly seeded and displayed.
passed_tests: Backend: All 29 API tests passed including new Cashier Portal endpoints
Backend: GET /api/cashier/menu returns 17 Indonesian F&B items with 4 categories
Backend: Shift management (open/close) with cash variance calculation
Backend: POS order creation, payment processing (cash/card/QRIS/online)
Backend: Order voiding with reason tracking
Backend: Dashboard KPIs (today_sales, today_orders, open_orders, current_shift, top_items)
Backend: RBAC - cashier.sudirman can only access Sudirman outlet, admin sees all
Backend: Auto-creation of sales_summaries entry when shift closes
Frontend: Login with cashier.sudirman@fnb.com / cashier123 successful
Frontend: Portal Selector shows Cashier as 'active' (not Coming Soon)
Frontend: Cashier Dashboard loads with KPIs and shift status
Frontend: Navigation between Dashboard, POS, Orders, Shift pages
Frontend: Shift management - open shift with opening cash, close with variance calculation
Frontend: POS page loads 17 menu items in 4 categories (Makanan, Minuman, Dessert, Pendamping)
Frontend: Cart functionality - add items, change quantities, remove items
Frontend: Checkout workflow with cash payment and change calculation
Frontend: Receipt generation showing order details, payment method, and change
Frontend: Orders page displays paid orders with proper status
Frontend: Language toggle EN/ID works correctly
Frontend: Admin user can access multiple outlets via outlet selector
Frontend: Theme toggle functionality working
Integration: Complete POS workflow from menu selection to payment receipt
Integration: Real-time dashboard updates after transactions
Integration: Proper outlet scoping and RBAC enforcement
